title: koanophyllon villosum subsp. cynanchifolium
intro: Koanophyllon villosum subsp. cynanchifolium is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Koanophyllon villosum subsp. cynanchifolium include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
